[{'text': "Now I can see the robot is back in the white corridor (middle corridor) at (12.08, 7.70). The robot is at the right side of the middle corridor. The green destination is above and slightly to the right. 

Looking at the map carefully, I can see there's a small gap/passage in the upper black band near the right side of the map (near x=11.5). The green destination appears to be just above the upper black band. 

I notice the map has a vertical gap near x≈11.5 (where the green destination is). Let me try to find this passage. I need to move slightly right to align with x=11.51 and then try to go north through the gap.

Let me rotate to face east first to adjust my x position.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01CAjfeZEEL2yBUSLb4jMAjE', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': -13}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
